about_raw.value: Founded in 1827, the University of Toronto is a public research university located in Toronto, Ontario, Canada. It is ranked #21 globally by QS World University Rankings 2024.
about_raw.raw_snippet: Founded in 1827, the University of Toronto is Canada’s top university...

tuition_raw.value: Undergraduate Domestic (Ontario): ~$6,100 CAD/year. Undergraduate International: ~$60,510 - $71,560 CAD/year. Postgraduate Domestic: ~$8,000 CAD/year. Postgraduate International: ~$30,000+ CAD/year.
tuition_raw.raw_snippet: International undergraduate arts and science fees start at $60,510 CAD.

living_raw.value: Estimated monthly living costs in Toronto, Canada: Rent: $1,500 CAD; Food: $400 CAD; Transport (TTC): $128 CAD; Utilities/Internet: $100 CAD. Total: ~$2,128 CAD/month.
living_raw.raw_snippet: Living expenses in Toronto are estimated at $20,000 to $25,000 CAD per year.

scholarships_raw.value: [{'name': 'Lester B. Pearson International Scholarship', 'value': 'Full tuition, books, incidental fees, and full residence support for four years', 'eligibility': 'International students nominated by their high school who demonstrate exceptional academic achievement and creativity', 'deadline': 'January 15'}]
scholarships_raw.raw_snippet: The Lester B. Pearson International Scholarship covers full tuition...

acceptance_raw.value: Overall undergraduate acceptance rate: ~43%. Postgraduate acceptance rate varies strongly by department.
acceptance_raw.raw_snippet: The University of Toronto has an acceptance rate of 43%.

employment_raw.value: 91.7% of undergraduate degree recipients are employed within 6 months of graduation. 94.6% within 2 years.
employment_raw.raw_snippet: Employment rate of 91.7% six months after graduation...

salary_raw.value: Average starting salary: ~$65,000 CAD across all faculties. Computer Science and Engineering averages are higher (~$85,000 CAD).

visa_raw.value: Visa type: Canadian Study Permit. Requirements: Provincial Attestation Letter (PAL), Acceptance Letter from DLI, Proof of Financial Support ($20,635 CAD living expenses + tuition), Biometrics, Medical Exam. Processing time: 8-12 weeks.
visa_raw.raw_snippet: To study in Canada, you must obtain a Study Permit from IRCC...

deadlines_raw.value: Fall (September) Intake: Early November (recommended for international), mid-January (final deadline).
deadlines_raw.raw_snippet: Applications for Fall generally close in mid-January...
